texto: Hopis have lived in America longer than anyone. We wanted to explore the concept of Earthly visitation through the eyes of people who have also witnessed the rapid evolution of modern culture. For us, their beliefs ring true on so many levels. Hopi prophecy speaks to the destiny of man...in a universe where we are not alone.
explicacao: Citação de T.J. Wolf sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Hopis have lived in America longer than anyone.
